rules.hierarchy: H1 up to 6xl clamp, H2 up to 4xl. Tight tracking on headings (tracking-tight).

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing on marketing, Dense 'Control Room' for dashboards.
layout_spacing.marketing_grid: Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, gap-8 to gap-12, high asymmetry.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, gap-4 to gap-6, height stretch.

components.buttons: Shadcn-based. Hover states must explicitly set text color (hover:text-white). Primary buttons use primary color.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.forms: Shadcn Inputs, explicitly styled focus rings (focus:ring-primary focus:ring-2).
components.charts: Recharts. Dark mode configured. Tooltip with glassmorphism surface. Stroke colors using primary/secondary/accent_red.
components.map: Leaflet with CartoDB Dark Matter tiles. Custom HTML markers for status (Red for Overdue, Amber for In-Progress, Emerald for Resolved).
components.ai_orb: Fixed position bottom-right, using the ai_voice_orb media image, glowing drop-shadow, floating framer-motion animation.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark futuristic 3D topographical city map for landing page hero background

dashboard_preview.description: Smart city command center dashboard visualization for marketing features section

ai_voice_orb.description: Futuristic glowing AI voice orb, to be used in the bottom-right Retell voice feature

report_images.description: Pothole/broken road sample 1 for dummy issue data
Pothole/broken road sample 2 for dummy issue data

city_backgrounds.description: Night city traffic for public transparency dashboard banner or auth background

instructions_to_main_agent: Always use 'data-testid' on ALL interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages).
Avoid AI-slop purple/violet gradients entirely. Use the defined palette: deep obsidian base with cyan, emerald, and red accents.
Implement 'Crystal Glassmorphism' for headers and sticky elements: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a subtle border-white/10.
Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'Manrope' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for data and numbers. NEVER use 'Inter' or 'Space Grotesk'.
Ensure all Recharts are wrapped in a ResponsiveContainer and use stroke/fill colors that contrast well against dark surfaces.
Build the Floating Retell Voice Orb in the bottom-right corner using the provided 'ai_voice_orb' media URL, adding a glowing drop-shadow and a subtle floating animation (via Framer Motion).
Ensure Leaflet maps use a dark theme (like CartoDB Dark Matter) to blend seamlessly with the dark mode UI.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the Supervisor Dashboard: strict grid layout, dense data, 1px borders, avoiding excessive soft shadows.
